definition: A liberation of mind cultivated through one of the brahmaviharas.
notes: The project keeps muditā audible as gladness in this compound, following the live muditā headword. The phrase should be written out rather than abbreviated with an ellipsis in translation notes or control surfaces. Excitement-language remains too reactive for the cultivated brahmavihāra quality.

context_rules.context: When discussing the four brahmavihāra liberations as a list
context_rules.notes: Write the full rendering rather than using an ellipsis placeholder.

example_phrases.notes: Shows the brahmavihāra compound with the governed muditā rendering.
